subcodes.first_line: The Pen of Eternity weepeth sore at that which the Tongue of Glory hath spoken concerning what hath befallen Him at the hands of those wretched ones who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذا یبکی قلم البقا بما نطق لسان البهاء عما ورد علیه من هولاء الاشقیا الذین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
